name: chuck
description:
-always use gais252805 as your guide project throughout this project
-first you need to setup supabase, create the table for the PR request and use the suggested table name in gais251805, create a sql scrtipt to connect it, for the print out you can find the bucket link for the template and api inside gais251805 for Project Integration & Sync List
-setup vercel and link it to this project,use the project id inside gais251805 for Project Integration & Sync List
-once done setting up, prepare the main splash showing guest, warehouse and admin
-phase one will focus only on the logic of the guest user,from filling out the form, submission and document generation

    guest ui will show pr and ris and inventory view
    -use gais251805 as guide for the ui
    -use gais251805 as guide for the left side navigation
    -use the contant for dept list and disclaimer
    -after done with phase 1 upto then we will move to phase 2

Automated system for Purchase Requests, RIS, and Inventory Management for LGU Pagbilao GSO.
